pull_request.title: Remove cur_local_vars_: scope tracking for local var duplicate detection is unnecessary
pull_request.body:
`cur_local_vars_` was added to detect duplicate `local` declarations within the same function scope. The requirement is simplified: only conflicts with top-level global constants (`global_const_vars_`) need to be caught.

## Changes

- **`c_gen.h`**: Remove `cur_local_vars_` field.
- **`c_gen.cpp` — `GenerateImpl`**: Remove the per-function `cur_local_vars_.clear()` + param seeding block.
- **`c_gen.cpp` — `CompileStmtLocalVar`**: Drop the `cur_local_vars_.contains` guard and `cur_local_vars_.insert` call; retain only the `global_const_vars_` conflict check.
- **`test_exception.cpp`**: Comment out `TEST(exception, local_define_duplicate)` — the intra-function duplicate detection it relied on no longer exists.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 function test()
     local a
     local b
-    return a, b
+    return a
 end

@@ -1,4 +1,24 @@
-function test(a, b)
+function test1(a, b)
     local c, d, e = 1, "test"
-    return a, b, c, d, e
+    return a
+end
+
+function test2(a, b)
+    local c, d, e = 1, "test"
+    return b
+end
+
+function test3(a, b)
+    local c, d, e = 1, "test"
+    return c
+end
+
+function test4(a, b)
+    local c, d, e = 1, "test"
+    return d
+end
+
+function test5(a, b)
+    local c, d, e = 1, "test"
+    return e
 end
